title: henckelia infundibuliformis
intro: Henckelia infundibuliformis, also known as the Lipstick Plant, is a flowering plant species in the family Gesneriaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Henckelia infundibuliformis include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of a tea, infusion, or tincture, where the leaves and flowers are steeped in hot water to release their medicinal compounds.
